# FFEFF_OBJECTOFFSETS | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFEFF_OBJECTOFFSETS ](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffeff_objectoffsets)

-  FFEFF_OBJECTOFFSETS 

Global Variable# FFEFF_OBJECTOFFSETS

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFEFF_OBJECTOFFSETS: UInt { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/ffeff_objectoffsets#Discussion)

OBJECT IDS cannot be used to identify trigger buttons in FFEFFECT.dwTriggerButton, and output axes in FFEFFECT.rgdwAxes[n]. Please use object offsets (FFJOFS_* constants), the only supported method.
